steps.title: Introduce the explanation
steps.content: The phrase after the blank, geological structures called arcs, explains what kind of structures are involved in the origin of Earth's continents. A colon can introduce that kind of clarifying explanation.

steps.title: Choose the valid boundary
steps.content: A runs the words together without punctuation. C uses a semicolon, but the words after it are not an independent clause. D creates a sentence fragment because Geological structures called arcs cannot stand alone as a sentence here. The colon correctly introduces the clarifying phrase. The answer is B.
